mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.description AS description, d.published_version_count AS publishedVersionCount, d.latest_published_version_id AS latestPublishedVersionId, COALESCE(v.item_count, 0) AS latestItemCount, d.created_at AS createdAt, d.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_dataset d LEFT JOIN eval_dataset_version v ON d.latest_published_version_id = v.id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND (#{like} = '%%' OR d.name LIKE #{like}) ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM eval_dataset WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (#{like} = '%%' OR name LIKE #{like})

SELECT d.id AS id, d.name AS name, d.description AS description, d.published_version_count AS publishedVersionCount, d.latest_published_version_id AS latestPublishedVersionId, COALESCE(v.item_count, 0) AS latestItemCount, d.created_at AS createdAt, d.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_dataset d LEFT JOIN eval_dataset_version v ON d.latest_published_version_id = v.id WHERE d.id = #{datasetId} AND d.is_deleted = 0

SELECT id AS id, dataset_id AS datasetId, version_no AS versionNo, CASE WHEN version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', version_no) END AS versionName, item_count AS itemCount, CASE WHEN version_no = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS draft, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_dataset_version WHERE dataset_id = #{datasetId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY version_no ASC

SELECT id AS id, dataset_id AS datasetId, version_no AS versionNo, CASE WHEN version_no = 0 THEN '草稿' ELSE CONCAT('V', version_no) END AS versionName, item_count AS itemCount, CASE WHEN version_no = 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS draft, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM eval_dataset_version WHERE id = #{versionId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT item_id AS itemId, field_id AS fieldId, cell_value AS cellValue FROM eval_dataset_item_cell WHERE item_id IN
#{itemId}
